codeReview.summary: The feature correctly localizes several covered Agents workspace strings, but it does not fully satisfy the feature contract because multiple first-screen/core customer-visible labels in the same workspace remain hard-coded in English on the demo path.

issues.description: The visible trigger filter chip for the manual run filter still renders the hard-coded English label "Manual" instead of using the locale dictionary, so the first-screen Agents filter row is not fully localized in zh/en as required.

The org-chart summary chip still shows the hard-coded English suffix "+N more" for overflow jobs. This is visible core workspace copy and should be localized or formatted through i18n per the feature scope.

The department cards still render hard-coded English count labels like "agent/agents" and "lead". These are customer-visible org-chart headings/chips on the Agents first screen and remain outside the locale system.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The frontend-i18n-worker skill says to read .factory/library/user-testing.md, but that library file is not listed in .factory/library/architecture.md and the worker transcript shows repeated test-file discovery misses (e.g. non-existent test/i18n-messages.test.ts and test/locale-provider.test.ts) before settling on test/i18n-core.test.ts. The skill guidance does not point reviewers/workers to the actual existing i18n regression test location.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl entry for ae0f2a06-7851-4e93-98c5-711946a1d605 shows failed Read calls for test/i18n-messages.test.ts and test/locale-provider.test.ts before updating test/i18n-core.test.ts.

summary: Reviewed commit af968d0d032fadd12228271ebbdf1a5719cc38af and the ae0f2a06-7851-4e93-98c5-711946a1d605 transcript. The feature is close, but it misses several still-visible English strings in the Agents first-screen filters and org-chart chips, so it should not pass scrutiny yet.
